overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a female character with red hair walking through a snowy mountain landscape. The scene features abandoned wooden structures, rocky cliffs, and snow-covered evergreens under an overcast sky, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with a cool blue-gray color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path along rocky cliff face

events.description: character passes the wooden signpost on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path beside a rocky cliff face, holding a rifle

entered.detail: steep rock wall covered with patches of snow rising beside the path
tall wooden post with a small sign attached, standing beside the trail
narrow trail with snow and exposed rocks winding through the mountains
snow-dusted pine trees scattered across the hillside ahead
hazy mountain peaks visible in the background through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy path hugging a rocky cliff face on the left. A wooden signpost stands beside the trail as snow-covered evergreens and hazy distant mountains fill the background under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley with abandoned wooden debris

events.description: path opens up from narrow cliffside to wider valley with scattered wooden ruins
character passes abandoned wooden cart and barrel on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through open terrain, passing wooden debris and abandoned structures

entered.detail: broken wooden wagon or cart partially buried in snow
old wooden barrel lying on its side next to the cart
snow-covered mountain slopes becoming more visible as the cliff recedes

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide snowy valley as the rocky cliff falls behind. The character passes abandoned wooden debris including a cart and barrel on the right, while snow-covered mountains become more prominent in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy valley approaching distant wooden cabin

events.description: distant wooden cabin becomes visible ahead in the valley

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant wooden structure with snow-capped mountains rising behind

entered.detail: small dark wooden building or shed standing alone in the snowy valley
bare dead trees with twisted branches scattered on the right hillside
tall mountain peak with heavy snow coverage dominating the background

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distant wooden cabin standing in the snowy valley, with leafless trees on the right and massive snow-capped mountains rising behind. The path continues through deeper snow toward the isolated structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, cliffside mountain trail into a vast, open snowy valley. It begins with the character walking along a rocky cliff face past a wooden signpost, with hazy mountains visible through an overcast winter sky. As the cliff falls behind, the terrain expands into a wide valley where the camera passes abandoned wooden debris, including a cart and barrel. The scene then opens further to reveal a distant wooden cabin nestled among leafless trees, while massive snow-capped peaks rise prominently in the background. Finally, the path leads the character through deeper snow toward the isolated structure.
